name: Drive Modification
description: The alteration of a drive letter, mount point, or other attributes of a data storage device, which could involve reassignment, renaming, permissions changes, or other modifications.

modification_scenarios.description: A USB drive previously assigned a specific letter is reassigned to another.
A mounted storage device is moved to a new directory path.
A shared drive's permissions are modified to allow different access levels (e.g., write access).
A network drive label is renamed.
Modification of sync settings for cloud storage mounts.

events.description: Indicates changes to a volume (e.g., drive letter reassignment).
Logs permission modifications or changes to removable storage.

configuration.log_path: Applications and Services Logs > Microsoft > Windows > Storage-Tiering > Operational

audit_configuration.description: Add audit rules to track changes to mounted drives.

unified_logs.description: Collect mount or drive modification events.

endpoint_detection_response.action: Configure policies to monitor and log changes to drive configurations or attributes.

siem_tools.action: Aggregate logs from multiple systems to correlate events and alert on suspicious drive modification activities.

log_sources.Name: linux:syslog
log_sources.Channel: Block device write errors or unusual bootloader activity

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: IOKit disk write calls targeting raw devices

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: IOKit raw disk write to EFI/boot partition sectors

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: IOKit raw disk write activity targeting physical devices

log_sources.Name: networkdevice:firmware
log_sources.Channel: Unexpected firmware image upload events via TFTP/FTP/SCP

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:Sysmon
log_sources.Channel: Raw disk write access via \\.\PhysicalDrive* or \\.\C:

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:Sysmon
log_sources.Channel: Raw write attempts targeting \\.\PhysicalDrive0 or sector 0 (MBR/partition table)

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:Sysmon
log_sources.Channel: Raw disk writes targeting \\.\PhysicalDrive* or MBR locations
